effect_66_Desc: You take 33% less damage from falling.
effect_67_Desc: You take 50% less damage from falling, and you can steer somewhat while falling.
effect_68_Desc: You take no damage from falling, and you fall slower, allowing you to steer in the air.
effect_7002_Desc: You're terrified of spiders of any size!
effect_7003_Desc: You're terrified of cakes and similar baked goods!
effect_7004_Desc: You're terrified of goblins, as well as anything associated with goblins!
effect_7005_Desc: You're terrified of dogs, wolves, and other canines!
effect_7006_Desc: You're terrified of snakes and other reptiles!
effect_7007_Desc: You're afraid of members of the opposite sex!
effect_7010_Desc: You're afraid of trees and other large vegetation!
effect_7011_Desc: You've become convinced that invisible demons are tracking you and obstructing your every effort.
effect_7012_Desc: You believe that everything around you is made of candy, cake, or other sugary treats!
effect_7013_Desc: You just realized that you're in the presence of nobility. In fact, EVERYONE around you is a King (or Queen) except you!
effect_7015_Desc: You believe you've become entirely invisible, except to demons. Anyone who can see you must be a demon in disguise.
effect_7016_Desc: You believe you're at a vast, world-encompassing dance party! Why isn't everyone else dancing? They're being so rude to your host!
effect_7017_Desc: You just remembered that you are a dragon in disguise, sent to assassinate a certain target!
effect_7018_Desc: You seem to have an extra arm! How convenient!
effect_7019_Desc: Oh no, your face fell off! You're hideous now!
effect_7020_Desc: You think everyone around you is speaking in a code language you can barely understand. What are they trying to hide?
effect_7021_Desc: You find that you can only speak in rhyme! (Whew, good thing slant rhymes are okay!)
effect_7022_Desc: You find that you can only speak in riddles!
effect_7023_Desc: Everything is hilarious! You can't stop laughing!
effect_7024_Desc: You can't speak! You can only pantomime!
effect_7025_Desc: When you say a pronoun (like 'him' or 'her' or 'me' or 'them') it comes out as a gibberish word!
effect_7026_Desc: You can no longer understand the concept of the number three! Even the word has no meaning to you!
effect_7027_Desc: You now perceive all males as females, and vice versa!
effect_7028_Desc: You keep saying molly-coddle all the time! What does that even mean?
effect_7029_Desc: You feel compelled to count everything you see. Out loud!
effect_7030_Desc: You can't walk; you can only hop!
effect_7031_Desc: All your teeth are loose! You have to be really careful or they'll all fall out!
effect_7032_Desc: You've just realized that everyone you know is a goblin spy!
effect_7033_Desc: You've just realized that everyone you know is trying to steal your money!
effect_7034_Desc: Tiny bats are flying everywhere. They keep trying to fly down your throat and choke you to death!
effect_7035_Desc: You believe you're the Queen of a distant land. You expect to be treated like visiting royalty.
effect_7036_Desc: You just noticed that all of your money is counterfeit! You're broke!
effect_7037_Desc: You lost the ability to see yellow things. They're completely invisible to you!
effect_7038_Desc: You lost the ability to see green things. They're completely invisible to you!
effect_7039_Desc: You believe you are a large flightless bird with a dangerous beak.
effect_7040_Desc: You're deathly afraid of getting wet!
effect_7041_Desc: You believe you've swapped bodies with another player. No doubt this is their fault!
effect_7042_Desc: Everyone you know is trying hard to make you look like a fool. The most frustrating part is they won't admit it!
effect_7043_Desc: You're terrified by the idea of crossing a bridge!
effect_7044_Desc: You're deathly afraid of milk, cheese, or any food containing dairy products.
effect_7045_Desc: You've become terrified of eating meat!
effect_7046_Desc: You keep seeing a hairy ape-man in the corner of your eye. Is he friend or foe?
effect_7047_Desc: You've become the most beautiful person in the world!
effect_7048_Desc: You lost the ability to say the letter R or pronounce an R sound.
effect_7049_Desc: Everyone is trying to get you to make eye contact so they can steal your soul!
effect_7050_Desc: Everything is so sad! You can't stop crying!
effect_78_Desc: Some damage from any Slashing/Piercing/Crushing attack that hits you is absorbed and channeled into your next Front Kick.
effect_79_Desc: Some damage from any Poison/Trauma/Psychic attack that hits you is absorbed and added to your next Stampede attack a 200% rate.
